title: Monitor and manage soils for production
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Monitor and manage soils for production demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Research information about soil

pcs.text: Research and analyse soil type, characteristics and properties
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and analyse soil type, characteristics and properties?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and analyse soil type, characteristics and properties.

pcs.text: Identify particular soil properties that are relevant to the workplace and research for further enquiry
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify particular soil properties that are relevant to the workplace and research for further enquiry?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify particular soil properties that are relevant to the workplace and research for further enquiry.

pcs.text: Determine, from published data and records, acceptable soil physical and chemical parameters for a specified crop
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine, from published data and records, acceptable soil physical and chemical parameters for a specified crop?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine, from published data and records, acceptable soil physical and chemical parameters for a specified crop.

pcs.text: Identify relevant properties of soils and areas of homogenous soils for testing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify relevant properties of soils and areas of homogenous soils for testing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify relevant properties of soils and areas of homogenous soils for testing.

pcs.text: Take soil samples from the land under production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take soil samples from the land under production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take soil samples from the land under production.

pcs.text: Collect, package, label and dispatch soil samples according to testing agency requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect, package, label and dispatch soil samples according to testing agency requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect, package, label and dispatch soil samples according to testing agency requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Research information about soil

elements.title: Apply information from soil testing to production or management plan

pcs.text: Classify soil types from the sample area according to standards for soil classification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Classify soil types from the sample area according to standards for soil classification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Classify soil types from the sample area according to standards for soil classification.

pcs.text: Compare results from soil testing with the identified soil physical and chemical parameters for the specified crop
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare results from soil testing with the identified soil physical and chemical parameters for the specified crop?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare results from soil testing with the identified soil physical and chemical parameters for the specified crop.

pcs.text: Compare results from soil testing with soil records and production history
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare results from soil testing with soil records and production history?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare results from soil testing with soil records and production history.

pcs.text: Review the comparative results and record differences
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review the comparative results and record differences?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review the comparative results and record differences.

pcs.text: Develop production or management plan and record testing and comparative results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop production or management plan and record testing and comparative results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop production or management plan and record testing and comparative results.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Apply information from soil testing to production or management plan

elements.title: Develop soil amendment practices

pcs.text: Identify soil properties capable of being ameliorated
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify soil properties capable of being ameliorated?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify soil properties capable of being ameliorated.

pcs.text: Identify relevant soil ameliorants or cultural practices and include in production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify relevant soil ameliorants or cultural practices and include in production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify relevant soil ameliorants or cultural practices and include in production plan.

pcs.text: Cost soil ameliorating activities and include in production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Cost soil ameliorating activities and include in production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Cost soil ameliorating activities and include in production plan.

pcs.text: Quantify and purchase soil ameliorants
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Quantify and purchase soil ameliorants?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Quantify and purchase soil ameliorants.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Develop soil amendment practices

elements.title: Monitor soil amendment practices

pcs.text: Sample areas of ameliorant activities for testing across a representative sampling area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Sample areas of ameliorant activities for testing across a representative sampling area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Sample areas of ameliorant activities for testing across a representative sampling area.

pcs.text: Analyse results to measure the performance of soil amelioration activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse results to measure the performance of soil amelioration activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse results to measure the performance of soil amelioration activities.

pcs.text: Record monitoring program and include in the production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record monitoring program and include in the production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record monitoring program and include in the production plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Monitor soil amendment practices

elements.title: Review and document the soil management plan

pcs.text: Record analysis of the sampling methods and amend methods as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record analysis of the sampling methods and amend methods as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record analysis of the sampling methods and amend methods as required.

pcs.text: Review monitoring program, amend for effectiveness and record
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review monitoring program, amend for effectiveness and record?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review monitoring program, amend for effectiveness and record.

pcs.text: Document production plan incorporating reviews and reports
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document production plan incorporating reviews and reports?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document production plan incorporating reviews and reports.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Review and document the soil management plan

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
